title: Persistence & State Rewinding
learning_outcomes: Formulate state rollbacks and time-travel debugging triggers.

content_sections.title: Thread Checkpointing
content_sections.content: To enable persistence, graph engines implement **thread checkpointing**. At each step, the state is serialized and stored in a database (checkpoint). This allows long-running agents to resume execution after crashes or pauses, and enables multi-user session management.

content_sections.title: State Rewinding (Time-Travel)
content_sections.content: Checkpoint databases enable **time-travel debugging**. By loading a past checkpoint ID, developers can inspect the agent's state at that point, modify it, and fork execution along a new path. This is critical for debugging and safety auditing.
